Deep Dey — Software Architect and Class 12 Student

My journey in JEE preparation, system architecture, and practical AI engineering

I am building this portfolio to document my long-term learning journey, development discipline, and real-world execution through products and systems.

Alongside my JEE preparation, I stay focused on building resilient, high-performance websites and software tools with production-oriented architecture.

My AI work is practical: I turn concepts into usable features, optimize reliability, and ship improvements that solve meaningful user problems.

This website represents my projects, technical growth, and continuous iteration across frontend, backend, analytics, and platform quality.

I continue learning every day through coding, debugging, and systems thinking, with a goal to merge academics and engineering excellence.
